parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf09567-event`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Route by Work Type

### Route by Work Type

Routes each item to one of 3 lanes: standard, priority + fallback.

Ports: ①→ Process 'standard' → Google Sheets · ②→ Fast-Track 'priority' + Alert · ③→ Hold Unknown Types (DLQ)

### Process 'standard' → Google Sheets

googleSheets — `appendOrUpdate` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Routed Work

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Fast-Track 'priority' + Alert

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Routed Work

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

### Hold Unknown Types (DLQ)

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

Next: Merge Routed Work

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

### Merge Routed Work

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Stamp Processing Time

### Stamp Processing Time

Stamps `processedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Send Summary to Gmail

### Send Summary to Gmail

gmail — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2

# Alert stakeholders on changes with Gmail in real time

**Pattern:** Event Notification · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Alert stakeholders on changes with Gmail in real time. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual thresholds is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook → Route by Work Type → Process 'standard' → Google Sheets → Merge Routed Work → Stamp Processing Time → Send Summary to Gmail

## Use it for
- Teams that want to event notification without manual effort
- Anyone automating thresholds in software development
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Responds in seconds
- Standardizes the process every time
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Google OAuth2; Google OAuth2 / service account.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🔐 Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials — never in node parameters.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your thresholds process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
